description: While in-flight, the Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS) issues a 'Climb, Climb' resolution advisory (RA) to the flight crew.

nodes.task_description: The pilot flying immediately and manually disconnects the autopilot.

expected_outcome.expected: Pilot takes manual control of the aircraft.

nodes.task_description: The pilot follows the TCAS RA by initiating a climb at the required rate, even if it conflicts with ATC instructions.

expected_outcome.expected: Pilot prioritizes the TCAS command over ATC instructions to avoid a collision.

nodes.task_description: Once the conflict is resolved and the TCAS announces 'Clear of conflict', the pilot informs ATC of the deviation and returns to their assigned altitude.

expected_outcome.expected: The crew safely manages the conflict and communicates with ATC.
